news.t: BlackRock Expands Access to Cash Management Strategies with Launch of Active Money Market ETFs

overview.description: The iShares Government Money Market ETF (GMMF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund which invests in US government money market instruments with short-term maturities. The fund seeks current income. GMMF was launched on Feb 4, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Expands Access to Cash Management Strategies with Launch of Active Money Market ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, BlackRock expanded the way investors can manage their cash with the launch of two money market ETFs, including the industry's first prime money market ETF. The iShare...
